Component Library

Templates

Browse all available templates. Each template is a fully composed page component using atoms, molecules, and organisms.

App

LandingTemplate

Marketing landing page with hero, features, pricing, testimonials

ChatTemplate

AI chat interface with sidebar, conversation management

DashboardTemplate

Admin dashboard with stats cards, activity feed

VersionTemplate

Version display with copy-to-clipboard

DownloadsTemplate

Download page for CLI, macOS, Ubuntu, Windows

Auth

SignInTemplate

Sign-in form with forgot password and sign-up links

SignUpTemplate

Registration form with sign-in link

ProfileTemplate

User profile with editable fields and danger zone

PasswordResetTemplate

Password reset form with token handling

PasswordForgetTemplate

Password forgot / email request form

Blog

BlogTemplate

Single blog post with sidebar and meta

BlogsTemplate

Blog listing with tag filtering and sidebar

Shared

ComponentsTemplate

Design system showcase: buttons, forms, alerts, tables, modals

ErrorTemplate

Error page with random messages and navigation

Store

StoreFrontTemplate

Store front with product grid, categories, newsletter

StoreItemTemplate

Single product detail with reviews and quantity
